failedAssertions.reason: version and serve commands silently ignore extra positional arguments while courses/lectures/download properly reject them. This inconsistent behavior could mask caller mistakes. The assertion requires extra positional arguments to either be rejected or documented as accepted behavior - the current behavior is neither consistently rejected nor documented.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: CLI Surface section with isolation rules, testing tools, available commands, and evidence capture instructions

notes: VAL-CLI-012 success payload structure verified via code inspection (downloadResult struct with Status, OutputPaths, LectureCount). Full live download test requires real Impartus credentials.
